item.title: some good news from mexico
item.description: In a statement, Mexico?s Supreme Court said the ?criminalization of abortion constitutes an act of gender-based violence and discrimination, as it perpetuates the stereotype that women and people with the capacity to get pregnant can only freely exercise their sexuality to procreate and reinforces the gender role that imposes motherhood as a compulsory destiny.? full article: https://www.nytimes.com/2023/09/06/world/americas/mexico-abortion-decriminalize-supreme-court.html reading this made me happy this morning, so i thought i'd share with my favourite online strangers on imgur (originally posted by @rbbli on 2023-09-07 07:51:30)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: So I saw this on the Front Page earlier today
item.description:
I see this and I gets me thinking. We see so many Unpopular Opinion Puffins like this why don't we just have a meme for an opinion everybody is thinking but nobody is saying.
(originally posted by @thecasuallemon in r/AdviceAnimals on 2014-09-06 20:44:11)

item.title: Fresh daily dump for you coffee #382
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
8
9
10
11
12
13
14
15. Me trying to make it as an indie game dev! P.S. Hello friendos, for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game to life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: We got LUCKY!
item.description:
My son and I hooked up this absolute monster over Labor Day weekend! I wouldn’t go public with a video like this if it wasn’t something special
FRONT PAGE UPDATE: thanks for the love! We caught Moby Dick on a live minnow under a bridge. She weighed 9.4lbs. We let Moby go free #fishing #awesome #wow

item.title: Traitor tRump deputy campaign manager identified in Arlington National Cemetery dustup.
item.description: One of two staffers involved in the altercation at Arlington National Cemetery is a deputy campaign manager for Donald Trump’s reelection bid, NPR has learned. The former president insisted this week the incident did not happen, highlighting a growing disconnect between the messaging of the candidate and his campaign. NPR is identifying both staffers after the campaign’s conflicting responses to the incident last week outside Section 60 of the cemetery, where many casualties of Iraq and Afghanistan are buried. The two staffers, according to a source with knowledge of the incident, are deputy campaign manager Justin Caporale and Michel Picard, a member of Trump’s advance team. Caporale is a one time aide to former first lady Melania Trump who left the White House to work for Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis before returning to the Trump campaign. He was also listed as the on-site contact and project manager for the Women for America First rally in Washington, D.C. on Jan. 6, 2021 where Trump urged the crowd to “stop the steal” before some of them stormed the U.S. Capitol. MORE @ SOURCE: https://www.npr.org/2024/09/05/nx-s1-5101991/trump-campaign-arlington-national-cemetery-staff-debate #PimpsAndThugsFortrump
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

Jaegermeister It's made of various german herbs Jaegermeister It'll make you forget verbs Jaegermeister although doctors would call you "fool". Jaegermeister You can mix it with Red Bull.
Lepanto institute has never heard of the Reformation.
S O U P !
PISS PILLS!
Have I ever had Coffee with a Bottom? My sibling in sin I *am* the Bottom.
The fact Kirk has only one (1) canonical son is a miracle.
SOUND ON
:D
Sounds like something that happened in 40K
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Where the Crawdads Dump
item.dc:creator: derek237

item.title: I Hate My Brain
item.description: I've been having trouble with fireworks this summer. I keep feeling like I'm back in Afghanistan, listening for mortars. I don't know what the fuck is wrong with me. I wasn't even that scared at the time. I remember mostly being annoyed at having to get into the shelter, or just laying in bed waiting for the alert to shut up. I haven't been to Afghanistan in over a decade, and I don't know why it's hitting me now. The only thing close to this I've had was when our pilot lost control on a mission and we went into a dive. I got a bit shaky during unexpected turbulence after that. But it wasn't this bad. I had to put on noise canceling headphone to be able to sleep over the 4th. This shouldn't be happening to me. I never had anything actually traumatic happen to me. I stayed in Bagram, the place where people who went to real deployed locations went for R&R. My roommate keeps telling me not to be ashamed, that needing help doesn't make me weak. that's not why I feel shameful. I feel shameful because I'm taking time away from people with real problems. I'm sorry. I'm whining. I'm going to talk to a professional, and hopefully they can get me sorted. I just had to scream into the void. EDIT: Thanks for everyone who's commented. It's really made me feel a lot better about going to our mental health professionals. I'm still a little nervous about my appointment, but I feel less like I'm doing something wrong.
item.dc:creator: BaWitda

item.title: Pigeon thieves
item.dc:creator: GravityVT
